package.title: TRAGUIN Premium Assam Tea Gardens Tour Package — Heritage Family: Dibrugarh • Jorhat • Kaziranga • Guwahati

highlights.text: Serial code AS-008 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-AS-TEAGARDEN-008
State / Country: Assam, India | Category: Premium Heritage & Tea Garden Family Tour
Destinations Covered: Dibrugarh • Jorhat • Kaziranga • Guwahati
Ideal for: Multi-generational Families & Culture Aficionados
Starting price: INR 56,800/- Per Guest (On Request)
Vehicle: Private Executive AC SUV (Toyota Innova Crysta) with English/Hindi driver-guide | Meal Plan: MAPAI
Route Plan: Dibrugarh ➔ Jorhat (2N) ➔ Kaziranga (2N) ➔ Guwahati (1N) ➔ Departure
TRAGUIN Curated Advantage: Private tea planter interactions, tea leaf picking, vintage high teas, VIP wildlife access.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Heritage bungalows combining historical authenticity with modern luxury.
Personalized Assistance: Dedicated trip manager tracking daily journey for family comfort.
Shopping: Estate teas, Muga and Eri silks in Jorhat, bamboo crafts near Kaziranga.
Important Notes: Kaziranga safaris Nov–Apr; book bungalows 60-90 days ahead; earthy colors for safaris.

itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Assam Tea Gardens Tour Package — Heritage Family: Dibrugarh • Jorhat • Kaziranga • Guwahati
itinerary.tagline: Tea Gardens Heritage • Dibrugarh • Jorhat • Kaziranga • 05 Nights / 06 Days
itinerary.overview:
Journey deep into the colonial elegance of the world's most illustrious tea country with British-era bungalows and UNESCO Kaziranga wetlands.

TOUR OVERVIEW\nDibrugarh Arrival ➔ Colonial Bungalow ➔ Jorhat Tea Capital (2 Nights) ➔ Kaziranga (2 Nights) ➔ Guwahati (1 Night) ➔ Departure with private tea tasting and jeep safaris.

PREMIUM ASSAM EXPERIENCE\nHeritage chang bungalows, tea cupping masterclasses, Majuli or Tocklai options, and Kaziranga rhino safaris across top tourist places in Assam.
itinerary.seo_title: AS-008 | Tea Gardens Dibrugarh Jorhat Kaziranga | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days tea garden package (AS-008 / TG-AS-TEAGARDEN-008): colonial bungalows, tea tasting, Majuli option, Kaziranga safaris, 4-tier stays.

highlights.text: Dibrugarh arrival and colonial Chang Bungalow heritage Day 01
Tea plucking ritual and sommelier tasting masterclass Jorhat Day 02
Majuli Island or Tocklai Tea Research excursion Day 03
Jorhat to Kaziranga with Orchid Park and cultural dances Day 04
Dual jeep safaris in Kaziranga National Park Day 05
Kaziranga to Guwahati departure along the Brahmaputra Day 06

days.title: ARRIVAL DIBRUGARH | STEPPING INTO COLONIAL HERITAGE & CHANG BUNGALOW LUXURY
days.description: Heritage exploration begins at Dibrugarh Airport. TRAGUIN escorts you to an exquisite restored colonial Chang Bungalow with afternoon tea estate walk and colonial high tea on the verandah.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mancotta / Purvi Tea Estate Walk, Heritage Property Tour.
Evening Experience: Colonial-style high tea with local savory pastries.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Heritage Bungalow, Dibrugarh.
Meals Included: Traditional Welcoming Dinner.

days.title: DIBRUGARH TO JORHAT | THE TEA PLUCKING RITUAL & TEA TASTING MASTERCLASS
days.description: Hands-on tea plucking experience then scenic drive to Jorhat tea capital. Afternoon exclusive tea cupping and tasting session with a master sommelier.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Interactive Tea Plucking, Jorhat Gymkhana Club (Historic Site).
Evening Experience: Sommelier-led Tea Tasting Masterclass.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Boutique Tea Resort, Jorhat.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Gourmet Dinner.

days.title: JORHAT EXCURSION | MAJULI ISLAND ENCOUNTER OR TOCKLAI EXPERIMENT CENTRE
days.description: Choice of Tocklai Tea Research Institute visit or private ferry to Majuli Island for Neo-Vaishnavite monasteries, mask-making, and monastic dances.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tocklai Research Centre OR Majuli Island Monasteries (Satras).
Optional Activities: Private pottery-making workshop with Majuli artisans.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Boutique Tea Resort, Jorhat.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Multi-course Dinner.

days.title: JORHAT TO KAZIRANGA | FROM MANICURED ESTATES TO WILD UNTAMED JUNGLE
days.description: Travel to UNESCO Kaziranga National Park and ultra-luxury jungle lodge. Afternoon Orchid and Cultural Park with vibrant Assamese folk dances.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kaziranga Orchid Park, Cultural Dance Amphitheater.
Evening Experience: Open-air bonfire with storytelling by local naturalists.
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Jungle Lodge, Kaziranga.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Forest-Inspired Dinner.

days.title: KAZIRANGA NATIONAL PARK | THE WILDLIFE SAFARI EXPLORATION
days.description: Morning and afternoon private open-top 4x4 jeep safaris through Central/Western and Eastern (Agaratoli) ranges for rhinos, tigers, and migratory birds.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Morning & Afternoon Private 4x4 Jeep Safaris.
Photography Points: Wildlife observation towers overlooking natural water bodies (Beels).
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Jungle Lodge, Kaziranga.
Meals Included: Breakfast, Lunch & Festive Farewell Dinner.

days.title: KAZIRANGA TO GUWAHATI | FINAL JOURNEY ALONG THE BRAHMAPUTRA
days.description: Final breakfast at jungle lodge then scenic trans-Assam highway to Guwahati Airport with optional Kamakhya viewpoint or silk boutique stop.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Trans-Assam Highway Scenic Drive, Airport Transfer route.
Meals Included: Lavish Breakfast.

hotels.name: Mancotta Heritage Chang Bungalow | Infinity Oaks Resort / Kaziranga Resort
hotels.description: OPTION 01 – DELUXE: Mancotta Heritage Chang Bungalow (Dibrugarh/Jorhat, 3N) | Infinity Oaks / Kaziranga Resort (Kaziranga, 2N) | Breakfast & Dinner (MAP)

hotels.name: Purvi Heritage Bungalows (Dibrugarh) | Borgos Resort / Kaziranga Wilderness
hotels.description: OPTION 02 – PREMIUM: Purvi Heritage Bungalows (Dibrugarh/Jorhat, 3N) | Borgos / Kaziranga Wilderness (Kaziranga, 2N) | Breakfast & Dinner (MAP)

hotels.name: Thengal Manor Heritage Hotel (Jorhat) | Diphlu River Lodge (Luxury Cabins)
hotels.description: OPTION 03 – LUXURY: Thengal Manor Heritage Hotel (Jorhat, 3N) | Diphlu River Lodge Luxury Cabins (Kaziranga, 2N) | Premium Dining Package

hotels.name: Kaziranga Golf Resort (Private Bungalows) | The Ultimate Travelling Camp (TUTC)
hotels.description: OPTION 04 – ULTRA LUXURY: Kaziranga Golf Resort Private Bungalows (Jorhat, 3N) | TUTC (Kaziranga, 2N) | Bespoke Personal Chef Menu

inclusions.text: Bespoke Stays: 05 Nights accommodation in selected premium tea bungalows and luxury safari lodges.
Luxury Ground Fleet: Entire journey via Air-Conditioned Toyota Innova Crysta with permits, toll taxes, and driver fees.
Meal Package: 05 Elegant Buffet Breakfasts and 05 Chef-curated Dinners at the properties.
Exclusive Experiences: Private Tea Tasting Session with estate sommelier & entry tickets to the Orchid Park.
Wildlife Exploration: 02 Private 4x4 open Jeep Safaris in Kaziranga National Park with professional trackers.
TRAGUIN Services: Personalized welcome gifts, daily premium bottled water, and dedicated 24/7 on-ground support.
Air/Rail Tickets: Commercial flights or train connections to Dibrugarh and out of Guwahati.
Personal Expenses: Laundry, telephone calls, alcoholic beverages, and tips for estate staff or drivers.
Camera Charges: Specific video camera or high-end DSLR fees at national park checkpoints.
Optional Excursions: Majuli Island ferry costs and local guide hires outside the primary plan.
Unforeseen Overheads: Additional costs from flight cancellations, natural weather delays, or unexpected events.
